details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest in-office whitening under $400 for Thu 3:00 PM
Task 2: Compare porcelain vs composite veneers for 4 teeth and find financing < $150/mo
Task 3: Find nearest clinic open Sunday within 15 miles of 94103 and submit emergency request
Task 4: Filter female cosmetic dentist (8+ yrs, rating 4.7+) and request 10:00 AM consult
Task 5: Complete smile assessment, filter recommendations (<$2500, <6 months), request emailed estimate
Task 6: Claim new-patient exam/X-ray/cleaning offer under $199 in March 2026, Tuesday 9:00 AM
Task 7: Find 0% interest Invisalign payment plan for $4,800 with monthly <= $200 and submit application
Task 8: Save two composite bonding front-teeth cases (1–2 visits) and request similar result for second
